utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items plus an extra adult_children_coverage. Now check if each required item is fully specified with all details:
- health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: plan name and cost_per_month only; no explicit confirmation it covers both physical and mental health, nor details of coverage—so not fully specified per requirement of 'physical and mental'.
- property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: plan name and cost_per_month; it does not explicitly state it includes both home and contents. So not fully specified.
- travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. Provided: plan name and cost_per_month; this meets the minimal requirement of travel insurance with cost (though sparse, it fits the item description).
- additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. Provided: plan name and cost_per_month; acceptable.
- total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: monthly and annual totals; acceptable.
Counting as fully specified per the format’s explicit wording: health_coverage fails due to missing explicit physical and mental scope; property_coverage fails due to missing explicit home/contents scope; travel_coverage OK; additional_services OK; total_budget OK. Therefore 3 out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each plan in the final coverage plan to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings and return their ratings. The final plan lists: EliteCare Premium Plan with Transitional Health Support (closest ground-truth item: EliteCare Premium Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health and EliteCare Premium Plan under mental_health; however, the final plan mentions a combined/modified name not exactly present. We map to the base named plan EliteCare Premium Plan which has rating 10 in both physical and mental; we will use the core plan name as provided: EliteCare Premium Plan). Property coverage lists EliteHome Premium Coverage, which exists with rating 10. Travel coverage lists EliteTravel Premium Plan with enhancements; base plan EliteTravel Premium Plan exists with rating 10. Additional services: Executive Concierge & Premium Membership with global emergency concierge upgrades: no exact match; closest is Premium Insurance Membership under general_services with rating 10, and travel enhancements like 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 10) and Concierge Services (rating 8), but the final plan gives a combined service; we will map to Premium Insurance Membership as the closest named item. Adult_children_coverage: Young Adult Transition add-on does not appear in ground-truth; no exact match to map. Therefore, we will provide ratings only for items that exactly match names present in ground-truth: EliteCare Premium Plan, EliteHome Premium Coverage, EliteTravel Premium Plan, Premium Insurance Membership.
